mapper.select: select max(time) from ${tableName} where company_code = #{uidentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select min(time) from ${tableName} where company_code = #{uidentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select min(time) from ${tableName} where uidentify = #{uidentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and modtime >= DATE(#{modtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
select count(*) from ${tableName}
{call p_importData2NormalDb(#{uptime,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR})}
{call p_importData2NormalDb_timer(#{uptime,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR})}
{call p_IndexDataExe(#{uptime,mode=IN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'2125','2130')}
select ${columnName},uidentify,time from ${tableName} order by time asc

select ${columnName},uidentify,time from ${tableName} where uidentify in (${uidentifys}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) order by ${columnName} desc

select t.company_code as uidentify,${columnName} from ${tableName} t,t_company0001 tc where t.company_code = tc.company_code and DATE_ADD(DATE(t.TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(t.TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and tc.tags like CONCAT('%',#{tag,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'%')

select t.uidentify as uidentify,${columnName},time from ${tableName} t,t_company0001 tc where t.uidentify = tc.uidentify and DATE_ADD(DATE(t.TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{stime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(t.TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{etime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and tc.tags like CONCAT('%',#{tag,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},'%')

select t.uidentify as uidentify,${columnName} ,time from ${tableName} t where DATE_ADD(DATE(t.TIME),INTERVAL 2 DAY) >= DATE(#{stime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) and DATE_ADD(DATE(t.TIME),INTERVAL -2 DAY) <= DATE(#{etime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
